name: innercode-app
description: The only app that ties values, life areas, journaling, and weekly check-ins to one AI coach. Inspired by PERMA, ACT and related psychology.

scripts.dev:mobile: node -e "const os=require('os');const n=os.networkInterfaces();for(const k of Object.keys(n)){if(k.startsWith('lo'))continue;for(const i of n[k]){if((i.family==='IPv4'||i.family===4)&&!i.internal){console.log('\n  Mobile: http://'+i.address+':3000\n');break}}}" && vite
scripts.preview:mobile: node -e "const os=require('os');const n=os.networkInterfaces();for(const k of Object.keys(n)){if(k.startsWith('lo'))continue;for(const i of n[k]){if((i.family==='IPv4'||i.family===4)&&!i.internal){console.log('\n  Mobile (preview): http://'+i.address+':4173\n');break}}}" && vite preview
